name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in our first computer science class. We talk every week about the latest in AI and startups.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Former manager who taught me everything about project management. Great sounding board for career advice.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Grew up on the same street. Life gets busy but we always pick up right where we left off.

name: David Kim
bio: My reliable workout buddy and hiking partner. Always up for an outdoor adventure on the weekends.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Shared a tiny dorm room for two years. Now she lives across the country but we still keep in touch.

name: Tom Baker
bio: My favorite cousin on my dad's side. We promised to stay in touch more often this year.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Met at the neighborhood bookstore. We swap books and discuss them over coffee every few weeks.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: We've been playing the same MMO together for 5 years. Great guy to chat with while gaming.
